basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar – Project Associate I – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Associate-I. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 10-06-2026. For detailed information please visit IIT Ropar official website.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S. in Electrical Engineering or Electronics or similar field or equivalent qualification with 60% marks (or 6 grade points out of 10)

seo_tags: IIT Ropar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
